name: gemini
description: Generate text, embeddings, and token counts with Google Gemini models via the Gemini API

envVars.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
envVars.description: Gemini API key from Google AI Studio (starts with AIza)

tools.name: List Models
tools.description: List the Gemini models available to the API key

pageSize.description: Maximum models to return per page (max 1000)

pageToken.description: Page token from a previous list call

historicalSummary.omitted: model capability details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Model
tools.description: Get details about a specific Gemini model

model.description: Model ID without the models/ prefix, e.g. gemini-2.0-flash

tools.name: Generate Content
tools.description: Generate a model response from text or multimodal content

model.description: Model ID without the models/ prefix, e.g. gemini-2.0-flash

systemInstruction.description: System instructions, e.g. {"parts":[{"text":"You are a helpful assistant"}]}

tools.name: Embed Content
tools.description: Create an embedding vector for input text

model.description: Embedding model ID without the models/ prefix, e.g. gemini-embedding-001

content.description: Content to embed, e.g. {"parts":[{"text":"Text to embed"}]}

taskType.description: Embedding task type, e.g. RETRIEVAL_QUERY, RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT, CLUSTERING

outputDimensionality.description: Reduced dimension for the output embedding (supported models only)

tools.name: Count Tokens
tools.description: Count the tokens a prompt would use for a given model

model.description: Model ID without the models/ prefix, e.g. gemini-2.0-flash

contents.description: Contents to count tokens for, e.g. [{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"Hello"}]}]

prompts.title: List Gemini models
prompts.prompt: List the Gemini models available to my API key and summarize their token limits.

prompts.title: Generate a response
prompts.prompt: Use Gemini to generate a response to a prompt I provide.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Google Gemini API Setup

steps.title: Sign in to Google AI Studio
steps.description: Go to https://aistudio.google.com and sign in with a Google account. The free tier works for testing without billing.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey and click 'Create API key'. Choose an existing Google Cloud project or let AI Studio create one for you.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Copy the key and add it to your .env file as GEMINI_API_KEY=AIza...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Models tool to confirm the key works. A 400 with API_KEY_INVALID means the key is wrong or restricted.

notes: This connector uses the Gemini Developer API key (x-goog-api-key header), not Google OAuth — do not use Google Cloud OAuth credentials here
Free-tier keys are rate limited; attach a billing-enabled Google Cloud project for higher limits
Generation and embedding calls are billed per token on paid tiers
